name: C-15 freshness gate exits zero when last-fetch marker is within the fetch-frequency window
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && printf '2026-05-25T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/soc2-tsc.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --framework-id soc2-tsc --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && echo fresh 1>&2
